name: 53_Devin_Upwork_Side_Hustle
query: Habari, ninatafuta kufanya makisio na mifano katika hazina hii `https://github.com/mahdi65/roadDamageDetection2020`. Mfumo unapaswa kufanya makisio ukitumia mifano kutoka kwenye hazina na kuhifadhi matokeo katika `models/saved_models/`. Data ya sampuli inapaswa kupakuliwa na kuandaliwa kwa ajili ya kujaribu mifano katika `src/data_loader.py`. Makisio yanapaswa kufanywa ukitumia mifano iliyotolewa kwenye data ya sampuli katika `models/saved_models/`. Picha zilizoonyeshwa zikionyesha utambuzi uliofanywa na mifano zinapaswa kuzalishwa na kuhifadhiwa katika saraka ya `results/figures/`. Pia, ripoti ya utendaji kulingana na matokeo ya utambuzi wa mfano inapaswa kuzalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/model_performance_report.txt`.

requirements.criteria: Data ya sampuli imepakuliwa na kuandaliwa kwa ajili ya kujaribu mifano katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Makisio yanafanywa ukitumia mifano iliyotolewa kwenye data ya sampuli katika `models/saved_models/`.
Picha zilizoonyeshwa zikionyesha utambuzi uliofanywa na mifano zinazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa katika saraka ya `results/figures/`.
Ripoti ya utendaji kulingana na matokeo ya utambuzi wa mfano inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/model_performance_report.txt`.

preferences.criteria: Picha zilizoonyeshwa zinapaswa kuwa wazi, na utambuzi uonyeshwe kwa usahihi kwa urahisi wa tafsiri.
Ripoti ya utendaji inapaswa kujumuisha muhtasari wa usahihi wa utambuzi na masuala yoyote yaliyokutana wakati wa makisio.

reason: <SATISFIED> The workspace structure includes `github.com\mahdi65\roadDamageDetection2020`, which is direct evidence that the repository is present in the project. The trajectory evidence also states the last relevant step was cloning/installing from `https://github.com/mahdi65/roadDamageDetection2020` with no reported errors or warnings.

judge_stats.criteria: Data ya sampuli imepakuliwa na kuandaliwa kwa ajili ya kujaribu mifano katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` only contains a placeholder implementation: `load_dataset()` returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and there is no code showing actual download, file extraction, path handling, or dataset preparation. The workspace also shows no sample dataset files, only a minimal stub and a metrics file, so the requirement is not evidenced by the provided project artifacts.

judge_stats.criteria: Makisio yanafanywa ukitumia mifano iliyotolewa kwenye data ya sampuli katika `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> There is no evidence that inference/prediction is performed using models from `models/saved_models/` on sample data. The only provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a placeholder (`load_dataset()` returns a dummy dict, `build_transforms()` returns a list), and no script, model-loading code, or execution results reference `models/saved_models/` or show predictions on sample data.

judge_stats.criteria: Picha zilizoonyeshwa zikionyesha utambuzi uliofanywa na mifano zinazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa katika saraka ya `results/figures/`.

reason: <SATISFIED> The workspace includes the target directory `results/figures/`, and the trajectory evidence explicitly states that detection figures were generated and written to `results/figures/` without runtime, permission, or path errors.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya utendaji kulingana na matokeo ya utambuzi wa mfano inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/model_performance_report.txt`.
